# FSTDESK Forum

FSTDESK Forum is a public food science, food safety, product development and food technology discussion archive.

## Useful links

- [Home](https://fstdesk.com/)
- [Recent threads](https://fstdesk.com/)
- [Members](https://fstdesk.com/members)
- [Tags](https://fstdesk.com/tags)
- [Sitemap index](https://fstdesk.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Thread sitemap](https://fstdesk.com/sitemap-threads.xml)
- [Category sitemap](https://fstdesk.com/sitemap-categories.xml)

## Crawling guidance

Public thread, category, member and tag pages are intended for indexing. Admin and authentication pages are not useful for indexing.
